title: rubus villicaulis var. subincertus
intro: Rubus villicaulis var. subincertus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus villicaulis plant that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of ellagic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis var. subincertus include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus villicaulis var. subincertus include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
